hooks.command: sh -lc 'ROOT="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-${CODEX_PROJECT_DIR:-$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)}}"; SCRIPT="$ROOT/.codestable/tools/codestable-ai-branch-guard.py"; if [ ! -f "$SCRIPT" ]; then SCRIPT="$HOME/.agents/skills/cs-onboard/tools/codestable-ai-branch-guard.py"; fi; if [ ! -f "$SCRIPT" ]; then SCRIPT="$HOME/.codex/skills/cs-onboard/tools/codestable-ai-branch-guard.py"; fi; [ -f "$SCRIPT" ] || exit 0; exec python3 "$SCRIPT" --root "$ROOT"'
